description_long: A young adult male stands upright, dressed in a long, double-breasted overcoat with a high collar and visible button details. Underneath the coat, he wears a hooded sweatshirt, the hood resting outside the coat's collar. His hands are partially covered by fingerless gloves, and he wears fitted pants tucked into sturdy, lace-up boots. The figure's facial features are stylized, with short, neatly parted hair and a neutral expression. The overall appearance suggests a modern, urban style suitable for cool weather.
description: A young adult male in a long overcoat, hooded sweatshirt, fingerless gloves, fitted pants, and lace-up boots, standing upright with a modern urban look.
description_view_0: Front view shows the full outfit, facial features, coat buttons, and gloves clearly.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the profile of the face, the layered coat and hoodie, and the boot details.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the back of the coat, the hood, and the back of the boots and hair.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, showing the profile, coat, and boots from the opposite side.
attribute_clothing_type: long overcoat, hooded sweatshirt, fitted pants, fingerless gloves
